211 G1CB G1CB_SUPP_WLK_RM (G1CB) Walk in Room Support Provided CHAR 1 Physical functioning and structural problems: walk in room - ADL support provided. "-" = Unknown, 0 = No setup or physical help from staff, 1 = Setup help only, 2 = One person
